label_verbatim: (Name of Corporation in Jurisdiction of Incorporation)
rationale: Foreign nonprofit's legal name in its home jurisdiction. Same key family as CORP_MBCA-12, MLLC-12, FICT-4 (foreign-entity-name convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: ...the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to carry on activities in the State of Maine is ___
rationale: Fictitious name used in Maine when the home name is unavailable per 13-B MRSA §301-A. Same key as MBCA-12 / MLLC-12 / FICT-4. Optional — only populated when the home name fails Maine's availability rules.

Boolean opt-in indicating Form FICT-4 (Statement of Fictitious Name) is bundled with this application. Required when entity.maine_fictitious_name is set, per the form's instruction that FICT-4 must accompany the use of a fictitious name.

label_verbatim: SECOND: Its jurisdiction of incorporation is ___ and the date of incorporation is
rationale: Home state or country (left blank in SECOND's two-blank line).

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...and the date of incorporation is ___
rationale: Date of incorporation in home jurisdiction (right blank in SECOND's two-blank line). Same key as CORP_MBCA-12 / MLLC-12.

label_verbatim: THIRD: Purpose(s) it is authorized to do under the laws of its jurisdiction of incorporation: ___ (line 1)
rationale: First wide line of THIRD's two-line free-text purpose description. Uses _line1/_line2 split convention (same pattern as registered_office.address_line{1,2} on sister NP_MNPCA-11 family).
Second wide line of THIRD's purpose description.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Does it seek authority to engage in all activities authorized in its jurisdiction and allowed by Maine Law? [X] Yes
rationale: Mutually-exclusive 'yes' option — entity seeks authority for ALL activities authorized in its jurisdiction. Enum value: 'all'.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: Does it seek authority to engage in all activities authorized in its jurisdiction and allowed by Maine Law? [X] Yes
rationale: Mutually-exclusive 'no' option — entity seeks authority only for a SPECIFIC subset (specified in Text6/Text7). Enum value: 'specific'.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: If no, specify activity (activities) for which authority is sought. ___ (inline trailing blank, line 1)
rationale: Narrow inline trailing blank on FOURTH's line 1, used when entity.maine_activities_scope='specific'. _line1/_line2 split convention.
Wide continuation line below FOURTH for the specific-activities description.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: Address of the registered or principal office, wherever located, is ___ (inline trailing blank, line 1)
rationale: Narrow inline trailing blank on FIFTH for the principal-office address. _line1/_line2 split (form has only one address concept across two physical widgets, not a physical+mailing pair like MBCA-12).

label_verbatim: FIFTH: ___ (street, city, state and zip code) — wide labeled line
rationale: Wide labeled line below FIFTH for the street/city/state/zip continuation. Distinct from MBCA-12 which uses entity.principal_office.mailing_address for its analogous second widget — that form has a physical+mailing pair, this form has a single-concept two-line continuation.
Right-aligned narrow blank on the Commercial Registered Agent row; populated when registered_agent.type='commercial'.
Commercial-RA name; populated when registered_agent.type='commercial'.
Noncommercial-RA name; populated when registered_agent.type='noncommercial'. Same canonical key as Text11 — filer uses one row based on type.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code) ___
rationale: Single-line physical address of the registered agent (NOT P.O. Box per parenthetical). Same key as MBCA-6 / MNPCA-6.

label_verbatim: SIXTH: (mailing address if different from above) ___
rationale: Optional mailing address.
Date of signature (left of EIGHTH-block area).

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of any duly authorized individual) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget, Shape D (matches MBCA-11, MLLC-12, MBCA-12, MBCA-12B, MNPCA-12B). Wet-ink signature line above has no widget.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'commercial'.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 1; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($45 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
